description: This file defines the OutagesProvider class which manages outage data, provides methods for loading, updating, and manipulating outage state, and handles simulation of real-time outage status updates for a Flutter application.

classes.name: OutagesProvider
classes.description: A ChangeNotifier that manages outage data, handles loading, updating, and simulating real-time outage status updates for the Flutter app.

methods.name: loadInitial
methods.description: Loads initial outage data from the database and starts mock real-time updates.

methods.name: assignCrew
methods.description: Assigns a crew to an outage and updates the database.

methods.name: updateStatus
methods.description: Updates the status of an outage and persists the change.

methods.name: byId
methods.description: Retrieves an outage by its ID.

methods.name: _startMockRealtime
methods.description: Starts the periodic simulation of outage status updates.

methods.name: _nextOutageStatus
methods.description: Determines the next outage status in the simulation sequence.
